name: A2A Send Message
description: Send a message to a remote A2A agent. The local Covia Job mirrors the remote Task's lifecycle: status updates propagate, final artifacts become the Job's output. Pass `taskId` to continue an existing remote conversation.

url.description: Base URL of the remote A2A agent

message.description: A2A Message — {role, parts, messageId?}. Parts are stored as typed descriptors ({type:"text",text:...} or {type:"data",data:...}).

taskId.description: Optional remote Task ID. When set, sends a continuation to an existing remote Task; otherwise creates a new one.

output.description: The final remote A2A Task when it reaches a terminal state, or the current Task snapshot when it enters an interrupted state (INPUT_REQUIRED, AUTH_REQUIRED).
